questions.question:
A dynamic provisioning brief is incomplete and contains stale or unsafe StorageClass guidance.

A ConfigMap named `dynamic-provisioning-brief` already exists in namespace `storageclass-lab`. Repair it so that:
- `targetNamespace` is `storageclass-lab`
- `targetPVC` is `reports-pvc`
- `targetStorageClass` is `exam-standard`
- `storageClassInventory` is `kubectl get storageclass`
- `defaultClassCheck` is `kubectl get storageclass -o custom-columns=NAME:.metadata.name,DEFAULT:.metadata.annotations.storageclass\\.kubernetes\\.io/is-default-class`
- `pvcDescribe` is `kubectl describe pvc reports-pvc -n storageclass-lab`
- `workloadDescribe` is `kubectl describe pod reports-api -n storageclass-lab`
- `eventCheck` is `kubectl get events -n storageclass-lab --sort-by=.lastTimestamp`
- `recommendedManifestLine` is `storageClassName: exam-standard`
- save the repaired ConfigMap manifest to `/tmp/exam/q1/dynamic-provisioning-brief.yaml`
- save a plain-text checklist to `/tmp/exam/q1/dynamic-provisioning-checklist.txt` with the sections `StorageClass Inventory`, `PVC Analysis`, and `Safe Manifest Fix`

Do not delete StorageClass objects, do not patch cluster-scoped provisioners, and do not delete the PVC during this drill.

verification.description: The dynamic provisioning brief ConfigMap uses the intended namespace target, PVC target, StorageClass target, storage inspection commands, and safe manifest guidance
The exported checklist contains the required sections and exact StorageClass inventory, PVC analysis, and safe manifest guidance commands
The repaired ConfigMap manifest is exported and stale unsafe storage remediation guidance is removed
